title: Premier announces Back to School Act will invoke notwithstanding clause
notes: CBC Oct 23 2025 — Nicholas Frew. Smith formally announces Bill 2 (Back to School Act) tabling Monday Oct 27. Order paper published. One hour of debate per reading. ATA anticipates but awaits text. Thousands rally at legislature. Smith: 'precondition has to be getting kids back to school.' Finance Minister Horner: 'unions will have to decide what they want to do.' REPLACES dead Alberta.ca URL for EVT-065. Anchors EVT-065.
